name: Romaine Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 large tomato, peeled and cut into wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Discard the dark green outer leaves and wash, dry, and chop the romaine lettuce.
2. Toss the chopped lettuce with the tomato wedges in a dressing made by combining olive oil, lemon juice, salt, pepper, and optional dill. Shake vigorously until well blended.
3. Serve and enjoy.
